metadata.title: I Never Want to Shy Away From You My Love, for My Heart Swells and Bursts Just at the Thought of Your Eyes Meeting Mine. I Will Forever Hold You Close to My Heart, and in the End When All is Gone - Remember That I Will Always Love You.
tracklist: 01 Hanging Stars - And When My Heart Finally Grows Too Weary to Carry This Sorrow Any Longer, I Hope You Will Remember That I Loved You Completely.
